title: Toasty Spanish Vegetables Pisto Manchego
description: A traditional Valencian dish featuring dry sherry and poached vegetables, this recipe is a macrobiotic-friendly and energizing option for a weeknight dinner. It combines the flavors of Spain with a focus on wholesome ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced zucchini and eggplant to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the sliced red bell pepper to the skillet and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until all the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Pour the dry sherry into the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the mixture simmer for 5 minutes, or until the liquid has reduced by half.
Stir in the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
